title: Cosmic blueprint, transpersonal truth, spiritual mutation
content:
Cosmic blueprint, transpersonal truth, spiritual mutation
Living Room (Social Self)Personality Sun, Mercury, Venus, Earth
Interface with others, where you speak, attract, ground
Kitchen (Creative Fire)Manifesting Generator Type, Sacral response, Emotional wave
Engine of energy, digestion, and creation
Bedroom (Inner Life)Moon, Design Venus, Hermit (2-line), Emotional Authority
Where you restore, dream, integrate
Basement (Shadow + Foundation)South Node, Saturn, Mars, Design Moon, Gate 61.2 (Pluto)
Deep learning, karma, drive, ancestral pattern
Stairwell / Halls (Transit Points)Profile 3/2, Incarnation Cross
Carries energy between floors—spiritual scaffolding
Roof (Observer / Mythic Narrative)6.5, 3.5, 60.4 — your transformation gates
You can see the horizon of your myth from here
🧬 PART II: OTHER FILTERS TO STUDY THE SELF
To study oneself universally (as archetype, ecosystem, myth, code), here are powerful recursive filters to complement Human Design:
1. 🧠 Jungian Archetypes / Shadow Work
